title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.228 - Physician and pharmacist not subject to discipline for cooperation
text:
191.228.  Physician and pharmacist not subject to discipline for cooperation. — No physician or pharmacist licensed in this state shall be subject to discipline for authorizing, assisting or cooperating with other health care professionals licensed by this state who are practicing their profession within the scope of their license.
(L. 1992 S.B. 573 & 634 § 8)
